ab: Keriden no singsi^ kami a tayra i tung-u-yin anini^ a romi’ad, masatisil kami a micakay to sapicomod a paya.
ch: 今天老師帶我們去動物園，我們在門口排隊買票。
en: Today the teacher took us to the zoo, and we lined up at the gate to buy tickets.

ab: Micomod to kami i tung-u-yin i, sowal sa ko singsi^, “I ka’ayaw i, ira ko ’aya’ayam; i kaikor i, ira ko ’one’oner, lonok han ita a minengneng.” saan.
ch: 進入動物園後，老師說:「前面是鳥類，後面是蛇類，大家自己參觀。」
en: After entering the zoo, the teacher said, "There are birds in the front and snakes in the back, so you can visit them yourself."

ab: Matalaw kako to ’oner, saka caay pinengneng kako to ’one’oner.
ch: 我會怕蛇，所以我不看蛇類。
en: I'm afraid of snakes, so I don't look at snakes.

ab: Adihay ko manengnengay ako a ’ayam, misaefeefer caira i faled no kilang; ira a ma’araw ako ko ekong, mafoti’ i laloma’ no fohang no kilang.
ch: 我看到了很多鳥，他們在樹上飛來飛去，還有看到貓頭鷹在樹洞裡睡覺。
en: I saw a lot of birds flying around in the trees and saw owls sleeping in tree hollows.

ab: I laloma’ no tung-u-yin, ira ko eco^, o efa^, o lokedaw; caay ho^ paka’araw kako i ’a:yaw, nika anini^ ma’araw to no mako, lipahak ko faloco’.
ch: 動物園裡有大象、馬和老虎，我從前沒有看過這些動物，今天看到了真的很開心。
en: There are elephants, horses and tigers in the zoo. I have never seen these animals before. I was really happy to see them today.

ab: Adihay ko nisya-si-ngan no mako, panengnengen no mako ci mama^ aci ina^.
ch: 我拍了很多照片，給爸爸媽媽看。
en: I took a lot of pictures and showed them to my parents.

ab: Anoro:ma a romi’ad, malahakelong kako aci mama^ aci ina^ a tayni.
ch: 下次要跟爸爸媽媽一起來。
en: Next time I will come with my parents.
